page.title: Iron Man
page.tagline: Sometimes you gotta run before you can walk.
page.intro: A dedicated Iron Man hub covering Tony Stark's evolution from weapons genius to self-sacrificing Avenger.

films.title: Iron Man
films.hook: The launch point of the MCU with charisma, speed, and mechanical style.

films.title: Iron Man 2
films.hook: Escalates tech spectacle while digging into Tony's vulnerabilities.

films.title: Iron Man 3
films.hook: A post-Avengers story that challenges identity beyond the suit.

cast.name: Robert Downey Jr.
cast.reason: Defined the role with swagger, wit, and emotional depth.

cast.name: Gwyneth Paltrow
cast.reason: Balances Tony's chaos with intelligence and emotional grounding.

cast.name: Don Cheadle
cast.reason: A trusted ally who reflects responsibility and military discipline.

cast.name: Jon Favreau
cast.reason: Brings loyalty and levity through every stage of Stark's journey.

pillars.title: Engineering as Heroism
pillars.description: Tony solves impossible problems with invention under pressure.

pillars.title: Accountability
pillars.description: The trilogy repeatedly confronts weaponization and unintended harm.

pillars.title: Identity Beyond Armor
pillars.description: Core tension: is Tony Iron Man, or does he become more than the suit?

pillars.title: Style and Signature
pillars.description: From HUD visuals to suit-up moments, Iron Man set a Marvel tone.

quotes.line: Sometimes you gotta run before you can walk.
If you're nothing without the suit, then you shouldn't have it.

scenes.name: Mark I Escape
scenes.impact: The origin forge sequence that redefines Tony's mission.

scenes.name: First Flight Test
scenes.impact: Captures the thrill and danger of Stark's iterative genius.

scenes.name: House Party Protocol
scenes.impact: A full-spectrum suit showcase blending chaos and control.

scenes.name: Hall of Armor Destruction
scenes.impact: Marks Tony's attempt to detach identity from machinery.
